title: Enantiodromia
description: AV work exploring the cyclical nature of transformation; how one state inevitably gives rise to its opposite. The installation reflects this transition through feedback, entropy, and synthesis techniques; material recorded in Greece and Croatia. Developed a real-time visual system translating sound into evolving generative visuals.
stack: Audiovisual | Analog Video | Generative | 3D Animation | Live Visuals | Touchdesigner
date: MaHalla, Berlin New Media Week, 2025, Statek Kultury, Zielona Góra 2025
collaborators: Timothy Isherwood aka sirosir - sound design, music composition

title: M.oving O.thers
description: A real-time generative image system investigating interaction between human input and machine-driven visual processes. The system produces continuously evolving visual environments shaped by algorithmic logic and external input.
stack: AI / Generative Media | Stream Diffusion | Creative Coding
collaborators: Perypezye Urbane - concept, choreography, performance, Enu - sound design, music composition, Maya Joseph - dancer

title: Mother
description: A performative demonstration exploring the coexistence of AI and the human body. I created the software generating the visualizations based on Stream Diffusion AI – real time video generation, together with 3D animated objects for dancers.
stack: AI / Generative Media | Stream Diffusion | Creative Coding
date: Ufer Studios Berlin, 2024, Venere in Teatro, Venice 2024, BASE Milano 2025, Teatr KTO Kraków 2025, Festival Par Chi Crea, Sofia 2025, Gallus Theatre, Frankfurt 2026

title: The Doors of Perception
description: Theatre play created at the Stefan Żeromski Theatre in Kielce, based on Aldous Huxley's novel. The play explores the topic of psychedelic substances, for which I created video projections, mapping, and the visual setting.
stack: Projection Mapping | Video Design | Theatre Visuals
collaborators: Agnieszka Jakimiak i Mateusz Atman - directors, Twix - sound design, music composition, Nina Sakowska - costume design, Theatre's actors and team

title: Visual-audio concert - 'Positive Disintegration'
description: The visual-audio concert is a unique reversal of the common situation in which visuals are only a background or an addition to the musical layer. In order to emphasize the role of the image in the reception of music, we focused on conveying the concept as a story told through the image, narrated by the music. The concert deals with the topic of positive disintegration, i.e. the theory of mental health, which assumes that mental health is a dynamic mental process, not a state.
stack: Cinema 4d | Octane | Touchdesigner | After Effects | Resolume
date: Spatif Club Warsaw, December 2022 / Panke Gallery Berlin, February 2024
collaborators: Teoniki Rożynek - music composition, sound design

title: The Galaxy Travel Agency
description: The installation containing old control consoles from tv broadcast trucks, that we have rewired and resoldered with Arduino to act as a controller for the open source 'Space Engine' game - where users travel through the universe with actual, real data. We have programmed and included premade missions and travels.
stack: Arduino | Space Engine | Processing | Circuit Bending
collaborators: Adrian Cognac - technical and conceptual collaborator

title: Amulet
description: Live visuals blending videos captured in Peruvian jungle, and live generated visuals from Touchdesigner. Performed live in Museum of Modern Art in Warsaw as the final concert of Sonic and Scenics Festival.
stack: Live visual performance, Audioreactive, 3D Animations, Generative Visuals, Touchdesigner
date: MSN Museum of Modern Art, Warsaw, 2025
collaborators: Teoniki Rożynek - music composition, sound design, live performance

title: Cymatics
description: The audiovisual project is based on live-recorded materials, where I used many different liquids reacting to sound frequencies. The live show consisted of music composition played by orchestra and electronic layers with visuals. Visuals are based on rendered cymatics records blended with generative, digital layers based on algorithms reacting to sounds in real-time.
stack: Cinema 4d, Max MSP, Touchdesigner, After Effects, Processing, Resolume
collaborators: Teoniki Rożynek - music composition, sound design, Jakub Janicki - sound design, music composition, Szczecin Philharmonic Orchestra

title: The Blob
description: See the sound. The Blob is an audioreactive, geometric creation programmed to breathe and visualize. It changes its shape under the influence of sounds, physically representing them. Movement gives the form an organic feel, invites interpretation, experience and careful observation. Blob is a visualization transferred from the screen to the physical world, playing the main role in an audiovisual performance that takes place in actual three dimensions.
stack: Arduino | Teensy | Makers Beam Mechanics | Electronics | Liquid latex work | Laser Cutting | 3D Printing
date: Jutronauci 2018 Warsaw · Permutacje Festival Konin · TEDx Warsaw · Gdynia Design Days 2019

title: The Blob - Theatre Scenography
description: Blob is the main scenography element in the theatre play - 'Teraz każdy z Was jest Rzeczpospolitą' - played at Teatr Dramatyczny in Wałbrzych and Teatr Współczesny in Wrocław. This much bigger version was created using techniques discovered while working on the first Blob, with deeper exploration of the liquid latex capabilities.
stack: Arduino | Trapezoidal screw | Liquid latex | WoodworksElectronics | Liquid latex work
date: Teatr Dramatyczny Wałbrzych · Teatr Współczesny Wrocław

title: The Box - for Bulb Project
description: DIY midi pedal controller. The Box takes 5 midi pedals and sends their signal through Arduino to the corresponding patch in Max MSP – controlling hacked christmas lights and piezzo microphones.
stack: Circuit Bending, Arduino, Electronics, Audioreactive, Max MSP, Interactive Installation, Laser Cutting, 3D Printing
date: Unsound Festival 2019 Kraków · Kwartludium – Roboty, Arduino i Game Over, Teatr Nowy Warsaw

title: Kondensator Przepływu
description: Audiovisual project, where everything is improvised and live generated. I work with two musicians and together we are creating a situation / experience that people can join in and sink into the world created. Every concert is unique, we shift and adjust what we do on scene to the current space, public and atmosphere.
stack: Live visual performance, Audioreactive, 3D Animations, Generative Visuals, Processing, Touchdesigner
date: Patchlab Festival Kraków · Vorspiel CTM & Transmediale Berlin · Sanatorium Dźwięku Sokołowsko · Revive Festival Warsaw
collaborators: Jakub Janicki, Bartłomiej Chmara - music composition, sound design, live performance

title: Joanna Duda KEEN
description: I have created a composition of generative and rendered visuals for Joanna Duda's first solo album. All songs are very extensive and different, some of them mainly performed on piano and some on the electronic setup. Just as the variety of sounds I have created variety of different visuals, which I mix together in the live performance.
stack: Live visual performance, Audioreactive, 3D Animations, Generative Visuals, Processing, Touchdesigner
date: Spatif Club Warsaw · JazzJantar Festival Gdańsk · Świetlica Krytyki Politycznej Warsaw
collaborators: Joanna Duda - music composition, sound design, live performance

title: Run with me along the forest trails.
stack: Live visual performance, Audioreactive, 3D Animations, Generative Visuals, Touchdesigner.
collaborators: Teoniki Rożynek - music composition, sound design

title: Stranger Things 4th Season Premiere After Party
description: Visual performance, Audioreactive VJ Set for Stranger Things 4th Season Premiere After Party on Orange Warsaw Festival. The party took place in the Netflix tent with a 10K diode led screen.

title: Computer Science - ER4SE
collaborators: Krzysztof Kurpisz - technical and conceptual collaborator, ER4SE - music composition, sound design

title: Hype Scream Project
description: HYPE SCREAM is a collection of characters and creatures inspired by the project 'The Last Scream' - (in)human faces generated by neural networks.
stack: Live visual performance, Audioreactive, 3D Animations, Generative Visuals, Processing, Touchdesigner
date: HT NFT Gallery opening 2022 · Thomas Schumacher VJ Set 2022
collaborators: Adrian Cognac - technical and conceptual collaborator
